# md-sitemap

> Open protocol: Markdown twins of HTML pages + machine index at /md-sitemap.txt, discovered via llms.txt.

- Spec repository: https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap
- Version: 0.1.0
- License: Apache-2.0

## Start here

- [README.md](https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap/blob/main/README.md): overview
- [SPEC.md](https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap/blob/main/SPEC.md): normative rules (MUST/SHOULD/MAY)
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap/blob/main/AGENTS.md): discovery algorithm for AI agents
- [IMPLEMENTATION.md](https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap/blob/main/IMPLEMENTATION.md): how to implement on a site
- [COMPARISON.md](https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap/blob/main/COMPARISON.md): vs sitemap.xml / robots / llms.txt

## Examples

- [examples/llms.txt](https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap/blob/main/examples/llms.txt)
- [examples/md-sitemap.txt](https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap/blob/main/examples/md-sitemap.txt)
- [examples/index.md](https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap/blob/main/examples/index.md)

## Live production

- https://meninydnes.site/md-sitemap.txt
- https://svatek-dnes.cz/md-sitemap.txt

## Related

- https://llmstxt.org/ — llms.txt proposal (complementary)
